NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING SEP-08-2011 AT 10:30AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance, nor objection filed. Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel or Self-represented Plaintiff for failure to file Proof of Service, obtain answer on First Amended Complaint is heard this day. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-10-2011 Continued To Sep-08-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel and Self-represented Plaintiff for failure to file Proof of Service, obtain answer or enter default on First Amended Complaint is heard this day. Plaintiffs are each sanctioned $350.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 9/8/2011 at 10:30 AM, in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)
